derive.title: Boards browser
derive.detail: Select an approved board to resolve its live-board preview before mounting.

derive.title: Resolved board
derive.detail: The selected board does not satisfy the approved-root live-board rules.

derive.title: Resolved board
derive.detail: This board is already mounted. Selection remains distinct from mounting.

derive.title: Resolved board
derive.detail: Board metadata has been resolved. Mount still requires explicit user confirmation.

guardrails: Resolved-but-not-mounted is a transitional display state inside Boards mode, not a new mode.
Mounting remains explicit because it changes shell state, even when the board is read-only.
Board selection does not enable terminal save behavior or terminal/saves/.
